title: AL's Scorpions & Crabs
description: This pack is a splinter pack which adds the Scorpions and Crabs from AL's Spiders Revamped as a stand-alone!
body:
![Scorpions & Crabs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b2517b774ac4384c43fd2f189559c4cf5df69c.png)

# 

This pack is a splinter pack which adds the Scorpions and Crabs from AL's Spiders Revamped!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jSTOYt4Rt8s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Three Scorpion variants that spawn in Desert and Badlands biomes, two Crab variants that spawn in Beaches, Rivers, and Oceans, and a Blue Fiddler Crab that Spawns in Mangrove Swamps.

Unlike the models in Spiders Revamped, however, the legs are simplified like the vanilla Spider so it can work as a stand-alone!

 

Additionally, as a bonus feature also from Spiders Revamped, regular Spiders will have a special texture when ridden by a Skeleton!

It's also recommended to use this pack alongside AL's Skeletons Revamped to have a matching Skeleton Jockey! (Optional)

 

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
